At-Home Healthcare Across UAE, KSA, Qatar, and Kuwait

Example Health is a digital healthcare platform that delivers lab tests, IV drips, and doctor consultations to your home across the GCC region. Founded in 2021, we serve Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Riyadh, and Kuwait City with DHA-licensed and CBAHI-accredited medical professionals. Every sample is collected by a registered nurse who travels to your home, hotel, or workplace at a time you choose. Results are reviewed by qualified doctors and delivered through our mobile app with clinical commentary within 24 hours for standard panels and as fast as 12 hours for urgent cases.

Our Services — Pricing, Turnaround, and Coverage

At-Home Blood Tests

Comprehensive blood work ranging from basic CBC panels to advanced hormone, vitamin, allergen, and genetic screening. A DHA-licensed nurse arrives within a 2-hour window, collects the sample with single-use vacuum tubes, and transports it to an ISO 15189-accredited partner lab. Standard panels start at AED 199; comprehensive executive screens range from AED 899 to AED 1,699. Results appear in the Example Health app with doctor commentary and trend tracking across past tests. We support more than 400 individual tests including thyroid function, diabetes markers, cardiovascular risk, liver and kidney function, STD panels, and fertility hormone profiles.

IV Drip Therapy

Medical-grade IV infusions administered at home or in our clinic. Our offerings include hydration drips, B-complex and vitamin C infusions, glutathione for skin and antioxidant support, NAD+ drips for longevity, immune boosters, and post-event recovery drips. Every infusion is prescribed by a doctor and administered by a registered nurse. Prices start at AED 299 for a standard hydration drip and go up to AED 2,499 for high-dose NAD+ protocols. Each appointment lasts 30 to 90 minutes depending on the specific formulation.

Doctor-at-Home Consultations

On-demand consultations with DHA-licensed general practitioners and specialists available 24 hours a day across Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Visits typically take 30 to 60 minutes, include a physical exam, e-prescription when needed, and follow-up messaging through the Example Health app. We also offer specialist visits for pediatrics, dermatology, and internal medicine. Consultation fees start at AED 299 and insurance reimbursement is supported for members of Daman, Bupa, Cigna, and Oman Insurance.

Newborn and Maternal Care

Specialized services for new parents including in-home newborn health checks, vaccinations on the DHA schedule, breastfeeding support from certified lactation consultants, and postpartum mother check-ups. Each newborn care package includes a DHA-licensed pediatric nurse and a WhatsApp line to a consulting pediatrician for the first six weeks. Packages start at AED 499 for a single visit.

Meet Our Medical Director

Dr. Example Name, MBBS, MRCGP, holds DHA license #12345 and has fifteen years of experience in preventive medicine and lab-based diagnostics. She leads our clinical team of twenty-two registered nurses and ten consulting physicians. Dr. Name completed her medical training at King's College London and her preventive medicine fellowship at Cleveland Clinic Abu Dhabi. She has published in The Lancet Digital Health and is a member of the American College of Preventive Medicine.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I book a blood test at home?

Open the Example Health app, choose a panel, pick a time slot within the same day or next day. A DHA-licensed nurse arrives within a two-hour window. You can book by phone or WhatsApp at +971-4-XXX-XXXX if you prefer not to use the app.

What does a basic blood panel cost?

A complete blood count starts from AED 199. A comprehensive metabolic panel including vitamins, lipids, and liver and kidney markers costs AED 549. Full executive health screens with genetic and cancer marker add-ons range from AED 899 to AED 1,699 depending on the panel.

Which cities and regions do you serve?

We currently serve Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman, and Al Ain in the UAE, Riyadh and Jeddah in Saudi Arabia, Kuwait City in Kuwait, and Doha in Qatar. New cities are added quarterly — check the app for current coverage in your area.

Are your nurses and doctors DHA-licensed?

Yes. Every clinical professional who works with Example Health holds an active DHA license and has passed our internal competency assessment. License numbers are visible in their in-app profile pages so you can verify credentials before your appointment.

How long do blood test results take?

Urgent panels return in 12 hours. Standard blood work returns in 24 to 48 hours. Specialized genetic, hormone, or allergy panels take 3 to 5 business days. You get an in-app notification the moment results are ready, with doctor commentary explaining what each result means for your health.

Can I use my insurance for blood tests or consultations?

We accept direct billing for Daman, Bupa, Cigna, Oman Insurance, AXA, and MetLife members. For other insurers we provide a reimbursement-ready invoice after your appointment. Check the insurance section in the app to confirm your coverage before booking.

Customer Reviews

Example Health holds a 4.8-star rating across 2,140 verified reviews on Trustpilot. Our members praise the reliability of same-day scheduling, the professionalism of our DHA-licensed nurses, and the clarity of the results commentary written by qualified doctors rather than automated reports.

Contact Us
